subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the divine Manifestation! His Holiness the Prince of Martyrs - may the souls of all be sacrificed in his path - in the place of sacrifice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بظهور الهی حضرت سید الشهداء روح العالمین فداء در مشهد فداء
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom
